summary: v3.x baseline runtime is green, but the newly added review-validity and orchestrator runtime-discipline benchmarks are not yet operationalized to release-grade pass evidence.
detected_gap: benchmark definitions and partial enforcement exist, but reusable benchmark artifact sets and recorded pass/fail evaluation runs are still missing.
next_action: finish TASK-029 and TASK-030 through runnable benchmark artifact sets and recorded self-hosting verdict evidence before cutting a new version
